languages.text: "Я думал{mf||а} подкрепление уже здесь! Я бы и сам{mf||а} был{mf||а} рад{mf||а} узнать об их участи".

traits.locale_text: "Я думал{mf||а} подкрепление уже здесь! Я бы и сам{mf||а} был{mf||а} рад{mf||а} узнать об их участи".

languages.text: "I thought the reinforcements were already here! I, too, would like to know what happened to them."
languages.original_text: "Я думал{mf||а} подкрепление уже здесь! Я бы и сам{mf||а} был{mf||а} рад{mf||а} узнать об их участи".

traits.locale_text: "I thought the reinforcements were already here! I, too, would like to know what happened to them."
"I thought the reinforcements were already here! I, too, would like to know what happened to them."
"I thought the reinforcements were already here! I, too, would like to know what happened to them."

languages.text: “我还以为援军已经到了！我也想知道他们到底出了什么事。”
languages.original_text: "I thought the reinforcements were already here! I, too, would like to know what happened to them."

traits.locale_text: “我还以为援军已经到了！我也想知道他们到底出了什么事。”

languages.text: « Je croyais que les renforts étaient déjà arrivés ! Moi aussi, je serais {mf|curieux|curieuse} de savoir ce qu'ils sont devenus. »
languages.original_text: "I thought the reinforcements were already here! I, too, would like to know what happened to them."

traits.locale_text: « Je croyais que les renforts étaient déjà arrivés ! Moi aussi, je serais {mf|curieux|curieuse} de savoir ce qu'ils sont devenus. »

languages.text: "Takviyeler gelmedi mi? Başlarına ne geldiğini ben de öğrenmek isterim."
languages.original_text: "I thought the reinforcements were already here! I, too, would like to know what happened to them."

traits.locale_text: "Takviyeler gelmedi mi? Başlarına ne geldiğini ben de öğrenmek isterim."

languages.text: «¡Pensé que los refuerzos ya habían llegado! A mí también me gustaría saber qué les ha ocurrido».
languages.original_text: "I thought the reinforcements were already here! I, too, would like to know what happened to them."

traits.locale_text: «¡Pensé que los refuerzos ya habían llegado! A mí también me gustaría saber qué les ha ocurrido».

languages.text: "Ich dachte, die Verstärkung wäre längst hier! Ich wüsste auch gerne, was aus ihr geworden ist."
languages.original_text: "I thought the reinforcements were already here! I, too, would like to know what happened to them."

traits.locale_text: "Ich dachte, die Verstärkung wäre längst hier! Ich wüsste auch gerne, was aus ihr geworden ist."

languages.text: 「援軍はすでに到着したはずだ！私も、援軍の行方を知りたい。」
languages.original_text: "I thought the reinforcements were already here! I, too, would like to know what happened to them."

traits.locale_text: 「援軍はすでに到着したはずだ！私も、援軍の行方を知りたい。」
